name: arc3-online-tr87
description: Self-rebuilding world model of ARC-AGI-3 tr87: openworld.PhasedTransition over 7 SURPRISE-detected regimes (rule changes at steps [0, 27, 57, 96, 125, 153, 210]); dynamics advance irreversibly as the rules change.
